snippet.title: Yabesh Thapa - Firfirey | OFFICIAL MUSIC VIDEO
snippet.description:
Finally releasing 'Firfirey' after 6 years feels a lot, but here we are. I hope this brings back good memories to you as it does to me. This song resonates of pure love and the emotions it holds is immense for me. I can't believe we've come this far.

Thank you for always being a part of the journey !

Written, composed and performed by Yabesh Thapa 

Flute - Shrijan Maharjan
Drums and Additional Percussions - Bikesh Bazra
Mix/Master - Kobid Bazra (Bajra Creation Records)

Visuals by Noisy

Get connected with us
https://www.instagram.com/yabush69/?hl=en

#ghaamchhaya

© 2026 ClassX Presentation

snippet.title: मंदिर के सीढ़ी चढ़ चढ़ मांगू | Ek Mulakat Jaruri Hai sajan | Naga Navtra | Paru Rabari
snippet.description:
यह गीत 1960 के सुनहरे दौर की याद दिलाता है — जब प्यार में सादगी थी, जज़्बात में गहराई थी और हर शब्द में एक कहानी छिपी होती थी।
इस गाने के ज़रिए हम उसी पुराने दौर की महक को आज के सुरों में फिर से ज़िंदा करने की कोशिश कर रहे हैं।

💫 “Old is not just gold… it’s emotion.” 💫

⇨Song : मंदिर के सीढ़ी चढ़ चढ़ मांगू | Ek Mulakat Jaruri Hai sajan
⇨ : Naga Navtra / Paru Rabari
⇨ :- Mharo bhai
⇨Lyrics : N Rabari 
⇨ : Maji Ultra Music Ahmedabad 
⇨Mix-Mastering :- Maji Music

This Valentine’s, feel a love that’s pure and devotional! 

#ORomeo Trailer Out Now!

#SajidNadiadwala presents
A #VishalBhardwaj film

Get ready for romance, chaos, and one unforgettable love story. O’ Romeo is all set to steal hearts. 
Hit ‘I’m Interested’ now for exclusive updates & more only on BookMyShow.
Link: https://bookmy.show/ORomeo

Starring :
Shahid Kapoor
Triptii Dimri
Avinash Tiwary
Farida Jalal 
⁠Vikrant Massey (Special Appearance)
Nana Patekar
⁠Tamannaah Bhatia
Disha Patani 
Aruna Irani
Hussain Dalal 
Rahul Deshpande

Produced By Sajid Nadiadwala 
Directed By Vishal Bhardwaj 
Story: Hussain Zaidi
Screenplay By: Vishal Bhardwaj & Rohan Narula
Dialogues by : Vishal Bhardwaj
Director Of Photography: Ben Bernhard, BVK
Creative Producer: Priti Shahani
Associate Producer: Manuj Mittra


Music on T-Series

O’Romeo Releases in Cinemas on 13th Feb 2026.

Follow Us On :

Facebook: www.facebook.com/NGEMovies
Twitter: www.twitter.com/NGEMovies
Instagram: www.instagram.com/NadiadwalaGrandson
YouTube: www.youtube.com/NadiadwalaGrandson

snippet.description:
Ji Chanta Matina invites you to stop hiding your feelings and let your heart speak. We bring you a playful confession of love. 

Written/Produced/Mixed by Sushant KC
Produced by Uff KC
Mixed/Mastered by Foeseal

snippet.title: Ramayana New Teaser REVIEW | Deeksha Sharma
snippet.description:
Ramayana New Teaser Review By Deeksha Sharma. Ramayana Ranbir Kapoor vs Yash Cinema Created by Namit Malhotra is all set to take Indian Cinema to Pan World Level with World of Ramayana. New Trailer of Ramayana Har Jagah Episode 1 The Jogi Community highlights the History like never before challenging SS Rajamouli Mahesh Babu Varanasi Movie for Box Office Collection Records. Ramayana Yash look vs Ranbir Kapoor first look will set debates on fire but Sunny Deol as Lord Hanuman might be the biggest surprise ever! Ramayana Teaser Trailer Expectations & Why Namit Malhotra might change the definition of Ramayana with his new Cinema- Full Details Discussion inside.

#Ramayana #RamayanaTeaser #RamayanaMovie

snippet.title: Vadh 2 - Official Trailer | Sanjay Mishra, Neena Gupta | Jaspal Singh Sandhu | Luv Films | 6th Feb
snippet.description:
An old prison guard- Shambhunath Mishra (Sanjay Mishra) and a jail inmate- Manju Singh (Neena Gupta) share a bond forged behind prison walls. 

When their ordinary lives are pulled into a moral conflict and truth refuses to surface, they stand at the centre of a choice that has consequences.

#Vadh2 #SanjayMishra #NeenaGupta

A Luv Films presentation, Vadh 2 is written and directed by Jaspal Singh Sandhu and produced by Luv Ranjan and Ankur Garg. The film is slated for a theatrical release on 6th February 2026.

Starring: Sanjay Mishra, Neena Gupta with Kumud Mishra, Amitt K. Singh, Akshay Dogra, Shilpa Shukla & Yogita Bihani
Written & Directed By: Jaspal Singh Sandhu
Produced By: Luv Ranjan & Ankur Garg

snippet.title: Dil Lagana Mana Tha (Official MV) Krish & Kishore Mondal | Kunaal V, Devv S | Sanam Johar Ashi Singh
snippet.description:
Dil Lagana Mana Tha (Official MV) Krish & Kishore Mondal | Kunaal V, Devv S | Sanam Johar Ashi Singh

𝑨𝒃𝒐𝒖𝒕 𝒕𝒉𝒆 𝑽𝒊𝒅𝒆𝒐 :-

Dil Lagana Mana Tha is an emotional romantic song that captures the pain of falling in love when the heart was warned not to. This video portrays deep feelings of love, heartbreak, and unspoken emotions, reflecting the journey of a heart that couldn’t resist love despite knowing the consequences. Beautiful visuals and soulful music come together to tell a story many will relate to.

👉 𝑺𝒖𝒃𝒔𝒄𝒓𝒊𝒃𝒆 𝒕𝒐 @𝑹𝑫𝑪𝑴𝒆𝒍𝒐𝒅𝒊𝒆𝒔 𝒇𝒐𝒓 𝒎𝒐𝒓𝒆 𝒓𝒐𝒎𝒂𝒏𝒕𝒊𝒄 𝒉𝒊𝒕𝒔 𝒂𝒏𝒅 𝒏𝒆𝒘 𝒓𝒆𝒍𝒆𝒂𝒔𝒆𝒔!

🎶 𝑺𝑶𝑵𝑮 𝑪𝑹𝑬𝑫𝑰𝑻𝑺 :-
Singer:  Krish & Kishore Mondal 
Starring: Sanam Johar & Ashi Singh
Lyrics: Kunaal Vermaa
Producer: Durgaram Choudhary
Music Composer: Devv Sadaana
Music Arrangement & Programming: Sharan Rawat
Mixing & Mastering: Bhasker Sarma @ Euphony Studio
©️ Koo Koo Tv 
Digital Partner: RDC Media

𝑳𝑰𝑲𝑬, 💬 𝑪𝑶𝑴𝑴𝑬𝑵𝑻 𝒚𝒐𝒖𝒓 𝒇𝒂𝒗𝒐𝒓𝒊𝒕𝒆 𝒍𝒊𝒏𝒆, 𝒂𝒏𝒅 🔁 𝑺𝑯𝑨𝑹𝑬 𝒊𝒕 𝒘𝒊𝒕𝒉 𝒚𝒐𝒖𝒓 𝒇𝒓𝒊𝒆𝒏𝒅𝒔.

🎬 𝑪𝑨𝑺𝑻 & 𝑪𝑹𝑬𝑾 :-
Director: Honey
Choreographer: Debu
Director of Photography (DOP): Karan
Project Head: Israr Ahmad
Video Creator: Screenshot Digital

Assistant Directors:
Shivani, Mukesh Tiwari

Still Photography & BTS: Chand Khan
DI (Colorist): Aman Kumar Kashyap
VFX: Mega Motion

Make-up & Hair: Guddu
Casting Director: Mujeeb Khan

Post Production: Screenshot Digital Studio
Editor: Aaditya Jangid
Art Director: Manoj Bhoyar

Production Executive: Ghani
Dressman: Sujeet
Costume Stylist: Adil Apperal
Dancer Costumes: Nishita
Dancer Management: Nikunj

Spot Boys: Anis, Madan

𝑳𝒚𝒓𝒊𝒄𝒔 :
Zamaane ki taraah
Hum bhi tode hain gaye
Aise tanha to na the Tanha chode hain gaye

Na dil se vo yaadein jaayein

snippet.title: The Devil Wears Prada 2 | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Everybody wants this. 

Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt, and Stanley Tucci return in The Devil Wears Prada 2, in theaters May 1. Watch the full trailer now. 

Almost 20 years after making their iconic turn as Miranda, Andy, Emily and Nigel—Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt and Stanley Tucci return to the fashionable streets of New York City and the sleek offices of Runway Magazine in the eagerly awaited sequel to the 2006 phenomenon that defined a generation. 
 
The film reunites the original main cast with director David Frankel and writer Aline Brosh McKenna, and introduces an all-new runway of characters including Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak and Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms and Tibor Feldman also reprise their roles as “Lily” and “Irv” from the first film. 
 
“The Devil Wears Prada 2” is produced by Wendy Finerman, and executive produced by Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt and Aline Brosh McKenna. The film debuts exclusively in theaters May 1.

hi.title: द डेविल वियर्स प्राडा 2 | आधिकारिक ट्रेलर
hi.description:
हर कोई यही चाहता है।

मेरिल स्ट्रीप, ऐनी हैथवे, एमिली ब्लंट और स्टेनली टुची 'द डेविल वियर्स प्राडा 2' में वापसी कर रहे हैं, जो 1 मई को सिनेमाघरों में रिलीज़ हो रही है। पूरा ट्रेलर अभी देखें।

मिरांडा, एंडी, एमिली और निगेल के रूप में अपनी यादगार भूमिकाओं के लगभग 20 साल बाद, मेरिल स्ट्रीप, ऐनी हैथवे, एमिली ब्लंट और स्टेनली टुची न्यूयॉर्क शहर की फैशनेबल सड़कों और रनवे मैगज़ीन के शानदार कार्यालयों में लौट रहे हैं। यह 2006 की उस सनसनीखेज फिल्म का बहुप्रतीक्षित सीक्वल है जिसने एक पीढ़ी को परिभाषित किया था।

फिल्म में मूल मुख्य कलाकार निर्देशक डेविड फ्रैंकल और लेखिका एलाइन ब्रॉश मैककेना के साथ फिर से जुड़ते हैं, और केनेथ ब्रानघ, सिमोन एशले, जस्टिन थेरॉक्स, लूसी लियू, पैट्रिक ब्राम्मल, कालेब हीरॉन, हेलेन जे. शेन, पॉलीन चालमेट, बी.जे. नोवाक और कॉनराड रिकामोरा सहित कई नए किरदारों को पेश करती है। ट्रेसी थॉम्स और टिबोर फेल्डमैन भी पहली फिल्म से अपनी "लिली" और "इर्व" की भूमिकाओं को दोहरा रहे हैं।

"द डेविल वियर्स प्राडा 2" का निर्माण वेंडी फिनरमैन ने किया है, और माइकल बेडरमैन, करेन रोसेनफेल्ट और एलाइन ब्रॉश मैककेना इसके कार्यकारी निर्माता हैं। यह फिल्म 1 मई को सिनेमाघरों में रिलीज हो रही है।

id.title: The Devil Wears Prada 2 | Trailer Resmi
id.description:
Semua orang menginginkan ini.

Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt, dan Stanley Tucci kembali dalam The Devil Wears Prada 2, tayang di bioskop 1 Mei. Saksikan trailer lengkapnya sekarang.

Hampir 20 tahun setelah memerankan Miranda, Andy, Emily, dan Nigel—Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt, dan Stanley Tucci kembali ke jalanan kota New York yang modis dan kantor-kantor mewah Majalah Runway dalam sekuel yang sangat dinantikan dari fenomena tahun 2006 yang mendefinisikan satu generasi.

Film ini menyatukan kembali para pemeran utama asli dengan sutradara David Frankel dan penulis Aline Brosh McKenna, dan memperkenalkan deretan karakter baru termasuk Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak, dan Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms dan Tibor Feldman juga kembali memerankan peran mereka sebagai “Lily” dan “Irv” dari film pertama.

“The Devil Wears Prada 2” diproduseri oleh Wendy Finerman, dan diproduseri eksekutif oleh Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt, dan Aline Brosh McKenna. Film ini tayang perdana secara eksklusif di bioskop pada 1 Mei.

es-US.title: El diablo viste de Prada 2 | Tráiler oficial
es-US.description:
Todos lo desean.

Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt y Stanley Tucci regresan en El Diablo Viste a la Moda 2, en cines el 1 de mayo. ¡No te pierdas el tráiler completo!

Casi 20 años después de su icónico papel como Miranda, Andy, Emily y Nigel, Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt y Stanley Tucci regresan a las elegantes calles de Nueva York y a las elegantes oficinas de la revista Runway en la esperadísima secuela del fenómeno de 2006 que definió a una generación.

La película reúne al reparto principal original con el director David Frankel y la guionista Aline Brosh McKenna, y presenta una pasarela completamente nueva con personajes como Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak y Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms y Tibor Feldman también repiten sus papeles de "Lily" e "Irv" de la primera película.

"El Diablo Viste a la Moda 2" es producida por Wendy Finerman y cuenta con la producción ejecutiva de Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt y Aline Brosh McKenna. La película se estrena en exclusiva en cines el 1 de mayo.

pt-BR.title: O Diabo Veste Prada 2 | Trailer Oficial
pt-BR.description:
Todo mundo quer isso.

Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt e Stanley Tucci retornam em O Diabo Veste Prada 2, nos cinemas em 1º de maio. Assista ao trailer completo agora.

Quase 20 anos depois de suas interpretações icônicas como Miranda, Andy, Emily e Nigel, Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt e Stanley Tucci retornam às ruas elegantes de Nova York e aos escritórios sofisticados da revista Runway na aguardada sequência do fenômeno de 2006 que definiu uma geração.

O filme reúne o elenco principal original com o diretor David Frankel e a roteirista Aline Brosh McKenna, e apresenta um elenco totalmente novo, incluindo Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak e Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms e Tibor Feldman também reprisam seus papéis como “Lily” e “Irv” do primeiro filme.

“O Diabo Veste Prada 2” é produzido por Wendy Finerman e tem produção executiva de Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt e Aline Brosh McKenna. O filme estreia exclusivamente nos cinemas em 1º de maio.

fr-FR.title: Le Diable s'habille en Prada 2 | Bande-annonce officielle
fr-FR.description:
Tout le monde l'attend.

Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt et Stanley Tucci sont de retour dans Le Diable s'habille en Prada 2, au cinéma le 1er mai. Découvrez la bande-annonce complète dès maintenant.

Près de 20 ans après avoir incarné avec brio Miranda, Andy, Emily et Nigel, Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt et Stanley Tucci retrouvent les rues branchées de New York et les bureaux élégants du magazine Runway dans la suite tant attendue du film culte de 2006 qui a marqué toute une génération.

Le film réunit la distribution originale, le réalisateur David Frankel et la scénariste Aline Brosh McKenna, et présente une toute nouvelle pléiade de personnages, parmi lesquels Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak et Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms et Tibor Feldman reprennent également leurs rôles de « Lily » et « Irv » du premier film.

« Le Diable s'habille en Prada 2 » est produit par Wendy Finerman, et produit par Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt et Aline Brosh McKenna. Le film sortira en salles le 1er mai.

de-DE.title: Der Teufel trägt Prada 2 | Offizieller Trailer
de-DE.description:
Alle wollen das sehen.

Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt und Stanley Tucci kehren in „Der Teufel trägt Prada 2“ zurück – ab 1. Mai im Kino. Jetzt den kompletten Trailer ansehen.

Fast 20 Jahre nach ihrem legendären Auftritt als Miranda, Andy, Emily und Nigel kehren Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt und Stanley Tucci in die modischen Straßen von New York City und die eleganten Büros des Runway Magazine zurück – in der mit Spannung erwarteten Fortsetzung des Phänomens von 2006, das eine ganze Generation prägte.

Der Film vereint die Originalbesetzung mit Regisseur David Frankel und Drehbuchautorin Aline Brosh McKenna und präsentiert eine komplett neue Riege an Charakteren, darunter Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak und Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms und Tibor Feldman kehren in ihren Rollen als „Lily“ und „Irv“ aus dem ersten Film zurück.

„Der Teufel trägt Prada 2“ wurde von Wendy Finerman produziert, die ausführende Produktion übernahmen Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt und Aline Brosh McKenna. Der Film startet am 1. Mai exklusiv in den Kinos.

it.title: Il diavolo veste Prada 2 | Trailer ufficiale
it.description:
Tutti lo vogliono.

Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt e Stanley Tucci tornano ne Il diavolo veste Prada 2, nelle sale dal 1° maggio. Guarda subito il trailer completo.

Quasi 20 anni dopo la loro iconica interpretazione di Miranda, Andy, Emily e Nigel, Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt e Stanley Tucci tornano nelle strade alla moda di New York e negli eleganti uffici di Runway Magazine nell'attesissimo sequel del fenomeno del 2006 che ha definito una generazione.

Il film riunisce il cast principale originale con il regista David Frankel e la sceneggiatrice Aline Brosh McKenna, e introduce una passerella di personaggi completamente nuova, tra cui Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak e Conrad Ricamora. Anche Tracie Thoms e Tibor Feldman riprendono i ruoli di "Lily" e "Irv" del primo film.

"Il diavolo veste Prada 2" è prodotto da Wendy Finerman e i produttori esecutivi sono Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt e Aline Brosh McKenna. Il film debutterà in esclusiva nelle sale il 1° maggio.

snippet.description:
MICHAEL – in theaters & IMAX April 24, 2026. Starring Jaafar Jackson, Nia Long, Laura Harrier, Juliano Krue Valdi, with Miles Teller, and Colman Domingo.

#MichaelMovie

MICHAEL is the cinematic portrayal of the life and legacy of one of the most influential artists the world has ever known. The film tells the story of Michael Jackson’s life beyond the music, tracing his journey from the discovery of his extraordinary talent as the lead of the Jackson Five, to the visionary artist whose creative ambition fueled a relentless pursuit to become the biggest entertainer in the world. Highlighting both his life off-stage and some of the most iconic performances from his early solo career, the film gives audiences a front-row seat to Michael Jackson as never before. This is where his story begins.

माइकल विश्व के सबसे प्रभावशाली कलाकारों में से एक के जीवन और विरासत का सिनेमाई चित्रण है। यह फिल्म माइकल जैक्सन के संगीत से परे के जीवन की कहानी बयां करती है, जिसमें जैक्सन फाइव के प्रमुख के रूप में उनकी असाधारण प्रतिभा की खोज से लेकर एक दूरदर्शी कलाकार बनने तक की उनकी यात्रा को दर्शाया गया है, जिनकी रचनात्मक महत्वाकांक्षा ने उन्हें दुनिया का सबसे बड़ा मनोरंजनकर्ता बनने के लिए अथक प्रयास करने को प्रेरित किया। उनके मंच से इतर जीवन और उनके शुरुआती एकल करियर के कुछ सबसे यादगार प्रदर्शनों को उजागर करते हुए, यह फिल्म दर्शकों को माइकल जैक्सन को पहले कभी न देखे गए अंदाज में करीब से देखने का मौका देती है। यहीं से उनकी कहानी शुरू होती है।

id.title: Michael (2026) Official Trailer - Jaafar Jackson
id.description:
MICHAEL – di bioskop & IMAX 24 April 2026. Dibintangi Jaafar Jackson, Nia Long, Laura Harrier, Juliano Krue Valdi, dengan Miles Teller, dan Colman Domingo.

Berlangganan saluran YouTube LIONSGATE untuk trailer film terbaru, klip, dan lainnya: https://bit.ly/2Z6nfym

https://www.instagram.com/michaelmovie/
https://www.facebook.com/michaelmovie
https://x.com/michaelmovie
https://www.tiktok.com/@michaelthemovie
https://www.threads.com/@michaelmovie

#MichaelMovie

MICHAEL adalah penggambaran sinematik tentang kehidupan dan warisan salah satu seniman paling berpengaruh yang pernah dikenal dunia. Film ini mengisahkan kehidupan Michael Jackson di luar musik, menelusuri perjalanannya dari penemuan bakat luar biasanya sebagai vokalis utama Jackson Five, hingga menjadi seniman visioner yang ambisi kreatifnya mendorong pengejaran tanpa henti untuk menjadi penghibur terbesar di dunia. Menyoroti kehidupannya di luar panggung dan beberapa penampilan paling ikonik dari awal karier solonya, film ini memberi penonton kesempatan untuk menyaksikan Michael Jackson dari dekat seperti belum pernah terjadi sebelumnya. Di sinilah kisahnya dimulai.

snippet.title: Gandhi Talks Trailer | Vijay S | Arvind S | Aditi Rao | A.R.Rahman | Siddharth J |  Releasing 30 Jan
snippet.description:
Not every story needs words.
Some are meant to be felt.

This time, the screen doesn't talk. It makes you listen.

Gandhi Talks, releasing in cinemas worldwide on the 30th of January.

Cast - Vijay Sethupathi, Arvind Swami, Aditi Rao Hydari, Siddharth Jadhav

An A.R. Rahman Musical 

Writer & Director - Kishor Pandurang ‘Belekar’
Producers: Rajesh Kejriwal, Gurpal Sachar
Producers: Umesh Kumar Bansal, Meerra Chopraa, Kishor P Belekar
Co-Producer: Anil Bhandari 
Production House - Zee Studios, Kyoorius, Pincmoon & Moviemill Entertainment
Creative Producer - Nisheeth Chandra
Associate Producer - Deepak R. Nangalia
Director Of Photography - Karan B. Rawat
Production Designer - Durgaprasad Mahapatra
Costume Designers - Neetu Bharadwaj, Priyanka Dubey, Kavitha
Sound Designer - Justin Jose
Music Supervisor - Shubham Bhat
Makeup Designer - Rohit Mahadik 
Editor - Ashish Mhatre
VFX - Postmen Studios
DI - Prime Focus Ltd.

Post-Production Head - Paras Fulambarkar
Background score Mixed by Suresh Permal

snippet.title: Figure Timro Dami · फिगर तिम्रो दामी - Official MV
snippet.description:
https://www.tiktok.com/@kumarbmzn  https://www.facebook.com/Kumarbmzntamang 

“𝗙𝗶𝗴𝘂𝗿𝗲 𝗧𝗶𝗺𝗿𝗼 𝗗𝗮𝗺𝗶” · 𝗕𝗶𝘀𝗵𝘄𝗼 𝗗𝗼𝗻𝗴 | 𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗶 𝗦𝗵𝗿𝗲𝗲 𝗣𝗮𝗿𝗶𝘆𝗮𝗿 | 𝗞𝘂𝗺𝗮𝗿 𝗕𝗼𝗺𝗷𝗮𝗻 | Ashish Manandhar | Rasmila Tamang.

          After the amazing response to the “𝗙𝗶𝗴𝘂𝗿𝗲 𝗧𝗶𝗺𝗿𝗼 𝗗𝗮𝗺𝗶” 𝗔𝘂𝗱𝗶𝗼 𝗦𝗼𝗻𝗴, we are excited to present the 𝗢𝗳𝗳𝗶𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗹 𝗠𝘂𝘀𝗶𝗰 𝗩𝗶𝗱𝗲𝗼. This release is a result of the immense love, support, and encouragement from all our viewers and listeners. We hope you enjoy this visual presentation just as much as you enjoyed the audio. Your continuous support motivates us to create more music and creative content in the future.
       
This music video features 𝗥𝗮𝘀𝗺𝗶𝗹𝗮 𝗧𝗮𝗺𝗮𝗻𝗴 and 𝗔𝘀𝗵𝗶𝘀𝗵 𝗠𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗵𝗮𝗿 in the lead roles. Ashish Manandhar is a highly talented dancer, experienced dance instructor, and versatile model. The video highlights 𝘃𝗶𝗿𝗮𝗹 𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗽 𝗱𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗲 𝗰𝗵𝗼𝗿𝗲𝗼𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗽𝗵𝘆 𝗰𝗿𝗲𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗯𝘆 𝗔𝘀𝗵𝗶𝘀𝗵 𝗠𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗵𝗮𝗿, which has become a major attraction of the song. Representing the Tamang community, 𝗥𝗮𝘀𝗺𝗶𝗹𝗮 𝗧𝗮𝗺𝗮𝗻𝗴 is a beautiful and hardworking model, widely recognized for her impressive performances in popular music videos. The music video is 𝗰𝗵𝗼𝗿𝗲𝗼𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗽𝗵𝗲𝗱 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗱𝗶𝗿𝗲𝗰𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗯𝘆 𝗠𝗮𝘂𝘀𝗮𝗺 𝗛𝗶𝗺𝗮𝗹𝗶, an accomplished director known for delivering several superhit Nepali songs. 
     
🎤 This is also the 𝗳𝗶𝗿𝘀𝘁-𝗲𝘃𝗲𝗿 𝗱𝘂𝗲𝘁 𝘀𝗼𝗻𝗴 𝗯𝘆 𝗕𝗶𝘀𝗵𝘄𝗼 𝗗𝗼𝗻𝗴 and 𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗶 𝗦𝗵𝗿𝗲𝗲 𝗣𝗮𝗿𝗶𝘆𝗮𝗿, with the song written by 𝗞𝘂𝗺𝗮𝗿 𝗕𝗼𝗺𝗷𝗮𝗻, making it a special and memorable collaboration for everyone involved.

🎧 Enjoy the perfect blend of a catchy melody, dancing vibe, witty lyrics, and pure Nepali vibes.
 
Please don’t forget to 𝗟𝗶𝗸𝗲, 𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗿𝗲, 𝗦𝘂𝗯𝘀𝗰𝗿𝗶𝗯𝗲 and leave your valuable feedback in the comments below.
Thank you for the continued love and support ❤️

localized.description:
https://www.tiktok.com/@kumarbmzn  https://www.facebook.com/Kumarbmzntamang 

“𝗙𝗶𝗴𝘂𝗿𝗲 𝗧𝗶𝗺𝗿𝗼 𝗗𝗮𝗺𝗶” · 𝗕𝗶𝘀𝗵𝘄𝗼 𝗗𝗼𝗻𝗴 | 𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗶 𝗦𝗵𝗿𝗲𝗲 𝗣𝗮𝗿𝗶𝘆𝗮𝗿 | 𝗞𝘂𝗺𝗮𝗿 𝗕𝗼𝗺𝗷𝗮𝗻 | Ashish Manandhar | Rasmila Tamang.

          After the amazing response to the “𝗙𝗶𝗴𝘂𝗿𝗲 𝗧𝗶𝗺𝗿𝗼 𝗗𝗮𝗺𝗶” 𝗔𝘂𝗱𝗶𝗼 𝗦𝗼𝗻𝗴, we are excited to present the 𝗢𝗳𝗳𝗶𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗹 𝗠𝘂𝘀𝗶𝗰 𝗩𝗶𝗱𝗲𝗼. This release is a result of the immense love, support, and encouragement from all our viewers and listeners. We hope you enjoy this visual presentation just as much as you enjoyed the audio. Your continuous support motivates us to create more music and creative content in the future.
       
This music video features 𝗥𝗮𝘀𝗺𝗶𝗹𝗮 𝗧𝗮𝗺𝗮𝗻𝗴 and 𝗔𝘀𝗵𝗶𝘀𝗵 𝗠𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗵𝗮𝗿 in the lead roles. Ashish Manandhar is a highly talented dancer, experienced dance instructor, and versatile model. The video highlights 𝘃𝗶𝗿𝗮𝗹 𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗽 𝗱𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗲 𝗰𝗵𝗼𝗿𝗲𝗼𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗽𝗵𝘆 𝗰𝗿𝗲𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗯𝘆 𝗔𝘀𝗵𝗶𝘀𝗵 𝗠𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗵𝗮𝗿, which has become a major attraction of the song. Representing the Tamang community, 𝗥𝗮𝘀𝗺𝗶𝗹𝗮 𝗧𝗮𝗺𝗮𝗻𝗴 is a beautiful and hardworking model, widely recognized for her impressive performances in popular music videos. The music video is 𝗰𝗵𝗼𝗿𝗲𝗼𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗽𝗵𝗲𝗱 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗱𝗶𝗿𝗲𝗰𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗯𝘆 𝗠𝗮𝘂𝘀𝗮𝗺 𝗛𝗶𝗺𝗮𝗹𝗶, an accomplished director known for delivering several superhit Nepali songs. 
     
🎤 This is also the 𝗳𝗶𝗿𝘀𝘁-𝗲𝘃𝗲𝗿 𝗱𝘂𝗲𝘁 𝘀𝗼𝗻𝗴 𝗯𝘆 𝗕𝗶𝘀𝗵𝘄𝗼 𝗗𝗼𝗻𝗴 and 𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗶 𝗦𝗵𝗿𝗲𝗲 𝗣𝗮𝗿𝗶𝘆𝗮𝗿, with the song written by 𝗞𝘂𝗺𝗮𝗿 𝗕𝗼𝗺𝗷𝗮𝗻, making it a special and memorable collaboration for everyone involved.

🎧 Enjoy the perfect blend of a catchy melody, dancing vibe, witty lyrics, and pure Nepali vibes.
 
Please don’t forget to 𝗟𝗶𝗸𝗲, 𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗿𝗲, 𝗦𝘂𝗯𝘀𝗰𝗿𝗶𝗯𝗲 and leave your valuable feedback in the comments below.

snippet.title: Maatrubhumi | Battle Of Galwan | Salman Khan, Chitrangada | Apoorva Lakhia | Himesh, Arijit, Shreya
snippet.description:
Maatrubhumi from Battle of Galwan is a tribute to the nation and to everyone who puts the country before themselves. With music composed by Himesh Reshammiya and vocals by Arijit Singh and Shreya Ghoshal, Maatrubhumi carries the weight of the story it represents.

#Maatrubhumi Song Out Now!
#SalmanKhan #BattleOfGalwan 

Full Song Available on:

Spotify -  https://bit.ly/4abo90N
YouTube Music  - https://bit.ly/3NDGhYv
Jio Saavn - https://bit.ly/4ah2i7h
Amazon Music - https://bit.ly/3Nun9fB
Apple Music - https://bit.ly/49SuGMF
Gaana - https://bit.ly/3NCCeM7 

Song Credits:

A Himesh Reshammiya Musical
Singer: Arijit Singh, Shreya Ghoshal & Master Mani Dharamkot
Music: Himesh Reshammiya
Lyrics: Sameer Anjaan
Music Arranged & Produced by: Meghdeep Bose
Musicians, Programmers & Backup Vocalists at Himesh Reshammiya Melodies: Suhas Parab, Subhash Parab, Barzin Contractor, Salman Shaikh & Anudutt Shamain.
Guitar: Ronny Satamkar
Violin: Raju Padhiyar
Flute: Lokesh Dadhich
Mixed & Mastered by: Salman Shaikh at Himesh Reshammiya Melodies Studio
Assistant Mixing Engineer: Anudutt Shamain
Himesh Reshammiya's Team: Rahul Sheth, Rajendra Toraskar, Prakash Serrao & Ravee Desae.

Salman Khan Films Presents - ‘BATTLE OF GALWAN’, directed by Apoorva Lakhia.
Produced by Salma Khan.
Starring Salman Khan and Chitrangada Singh 

Follow us on:

Twitter - https://x.com/SKF_Music

snippet.description:
Mana Ko Haal is a heartfelt portrayal of love, vulnerability, and the unspoken emotions that live quietly within us. Through raw melodies and sincere lyrics, we have tried to capture the fragile state of a heart caught between longing, hope, and truth. The visuals mirror this emotional journey, bringing to life moments of connection, distance, and reflection that many hearts will recognize as their own. 

Follow Ekdev:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ekdev.limbu/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/EkdevLimbuThegim/

Listen to "Mana Ko Haal" now: https://ffm.to/manakohaal

Credits
Vocal, Composition & Lyrics: Ekdev Limbu
Cast: Mahek Shrestha

Audio Credits : 
Music Producer: Saswot Shrestha (Omniphonics Studio)
Mix and Master : Saswot Shrestha
Additional Composition / Lyrics: Dechen Phinasa, Salin Magar (Hook Studio)
Guitar: Bishal Chhetri, Bibek Rai
Drums: Neepesh Pariyar
Keys: Santosh Tamang

Video Credits : 
Directed by: Abhi Sampang Rai and Pragya Rai 
DOP: Ashesh Limbu, Prabin Mahato, Yogesh Rai (Chronicle Films)
Edit/Color: Bikesh Magar
Style/ MUA: Pragya Rai , Samasti Rai

Media Partner: Routine Of Nepali Music
Artist Manager: Bhaba Shrestha
Digital Manager: Ashim KC
For Business/Licensing inquiries: ekdevlimbu@gmail.com

Listen to Ekdev Limbu on:
▶︎ Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/1jJGnkMQFNsCoDimuhJgIf
▶︎ Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/np/artist/ekdev-limbu/1501675497
▶︎ YouTube Playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLDIJJN1N159Y_ayrr8nM0Vl4dBS9wi8zK

"BORDER 2"

snippet.title: Qubool (Full Video) | Haq | Vishal Mishra | Armaan Khan | Yami Gautam & Emraan Hashmi | Hindi Song
snippet.description:
Times Music presents the official full video song “Qubool” from the movie Haq. With heartfelt lyrics & soulful vocals, Qubool captures the raw essence of love.

Whether you're in love, healing, or simply a fan of meaningful love songs, 'Qubool' is a song that speaks to the heart. It's the kind of track you’ll want to put on repeat.

#Qubool #HAqSongs #LoveSong #RomanticSong #NewSong #TrendingSong #YamiGautam #EmraanHashmi #VishalMishra #ArmaanKhan #QuboolHai #NewTrendingSong  #DekhoZaraDekhoNaamTeraLikhaHai

👉🏻 SUBSCRIBE to Times Music - https://bit.ly/tmchnl

Like || Share || Spread || Love

https://youtube.com/@timesmusicindia

Cast- Yami Gautam, Emraan Hashmi, Vartika Singh, Danish Husain, Sheeba Chadha, Aseem Hattangady
Directed by- Suparn S Varma
Produced by- Vineet Jain
Produced by- Vishal Gurnani, Juhi Parekh Mehta, Harman Baweja
Co-Produced by- Amrita Pandey, Suparn S Varma, Rowena Baweja, Sandeep Singh
Written by- Reshu Nath | Music by - Vishal Mishra

Song Credits 
Composer : Vishal Mishra
Lyrics : Kaushal Kishore
Singer : Armaan Khan 
Arrangement & Production : Vishal Mishra
Music Production by : Gaurav Vaswani
Additional Production : Kandarpa Kalita, Bitupon Boruah
Additional Vocals - Vishal Mishra 
Music Assistant : Kumar Gaurav Singh, Trihangku Lahkar, Bitupon Boruah
Mixed & Mastered by : Trihangku Lahkar @VMS

Bass : Aalaap Raju
Strokes : Tapas Roy
Acoustic Guitar : Kandarpa Kalita
Live Rhythm Arranged by : Prashant Sonagra & Swaranjay Dhumal
Tabla : Prashant Sonagra
Dholak : Mushtak Khan & Ishteyak Khan
Percussions : Swaranjay Dhumal, Prashant Sonagra, Harsh Bhoir & Mohit Kathak

Live Rhythms, Strokes Recorded at YRF Studio by : Vijay Dayal, Sagar Sathe
Guitars, Vocals Recorded at VMS by : Trihangku Lahkar & Bitupon Boruah

Lyrics Of Song ‘Qubool’
 
Mila Asmaan Se Koi Noor Kohinoor Dastoor Mera
Lo Aaj Se Hua Main Sadiyon Ko Tera
 
Dekho Zara Dekho Naam Tera Likha Hai
Mera Hai Jo Mera Sab Tera Ho Chuka Hai
 
Dil Pe Ab Na Zor Koi
Har Qadam Teri Or Hai
Saans Hai Khushboo Bhari
Har Raasta Ab Phool Hai
 
Koi Shart Ho Ya Dard Ho
Yeh Raabta Qubool Hai
Har Saans Hai Khushboo Bhari
Har Raasta Qubool Hai
 
Koi Shart Ho

Qubool Teri Zid Hai Saari
Saari Baatein Qubool Hain
Qubool Saare Din Tumhaare
Siyah Raatein Qubool Hain
 
Tu Saaye-Baan Tu, Teri Chaanv Mein Khud Ko Bhulakar Jhoom Loon
Yoon Tera Hoon, Tu Dard De To Dard Ko Bhi Choom Loon
Muskuraana Hai Tujhi Se Tujhse hi Aaraam hai
Tu Nahi To Main Nahi Hoon
Zindagi Tere Naam Hai
Tu Na To Main Bemaaine
Hona Mera Hi Fizool Hai
Koi Shart Ho Ya Dard Ho
Yeh Raabta Qubool Hai
 
Hai Ishq Mein Jab Doobe Hum
Gham Bhi Mile To Kaisa Gham
Tera Sahi Tera Ghalat
Tera Jhooth Bhi To Qubool Hai
Accha Bura Kya Tolna
Kya Mashwara Kya Sochna
Mahboob Hota Hai Khuda
Yahi Ishq Ka To Usool Hai

Lyrics: 
Lu hai Manungkotaima mero dil basyo lali othaimaa.
Lu hai manung kotaima najar nalagau lali othaima.

Pirati lam na ta Saili ghumna lai jamna ta.
Pirati launna ma Saila ekdine pauna sa.

Oi hoi damauli katesi madiko pool hitaiko mayalai gulab ko phool.

Ghara mero rukumai timi Mam pareu ukhumai.
Ghar mero tanahu ho launa ke bhanam bhanam bho.

Na rup maa khot timro sundar gulabi otha timro.
Ke hereu tesari o kho laaj lagyo besari.

O hoi marsyandi salala paniko bhel kisimai raichha ni mayako khel.

Tan ramro Mam ramro timi lajauda jhan ramro.
Jiu pani kasilo timro muharai hasilo.

Ke socheu bhanata timle paraichheu Manata.
Ma ta gurung ki chhori ho mero khyalmai dil chori bho.

Lyrics: 
Lu hai Manungkotaima mero dil basyo lali othaimaa.
Lu hai manung kotaima najar nalagau lali othaima.

Pirati lam na ta Saili ghumna lai jamna ta.
Pirati launna ma Saila ekdine pauna sa.

Oi hoi damauli katesi madiko pool hitaiko mayalai gulab ko phool.

Ghara mero rukumai timi Mam pareu ukhumai.
Ghar mero tanahu ho launa ke bhanam bhanam bho.

Na rup maa khot timro sundar gulabi otha timro.
Ke hereu tesari o kho laaj lagyo besari.

O hoi marsyandi salala paniko bhel kisimai raichha ni mayako khel.

Tan ramro Mam ramro timi lajauda jhan ramro.
Jiu pani kasilo timro muharai hasilo.

Ke socheu bhanata timle paraichheu Manata.
Ma ta gurung ki chhori ho mero khyalmai dil chori bho.

snippet.title: Booyah Premier League 2026 | Day 1 Part 1
snippet.description:
Welcome to the Booyah Premier League 2026💎🏏
You’ve seen your favorite Free Fire MAX creators dominate the battlefield 🎮Now watch them rule the cricket field 🏏🔥
All your favorite Free Fire MAX creators & esports athletes under one stadium, fighting for that one Booyah Premier League trophy 🏆💥

🔥Kiski fielding hogi set? Kiss ka balla karega halla?🏏💀

Match Schedule- Day 1
Stream 1: 
31st Jan - Match 1 - 9:30 AM - Solara Sultans vs Bermuda Blasters
31st Jan - Match 2 - 11:20 AM - Nexterra Nawabs vs Kalahari Knights
31st Jan - Match 3 - 1:10 PM - Peak Panthers vs Solara Sultans

Next Up: Stream 2: https://youtube.com/live/KgiBFgyiHjI?feature=share 
31st Jan - Match 4 - 3:30 PM - Alpine Aces vs Nexterra Nawabs
31st Jan - Match 5 - 5:20 PM - Peak Panthers vs Bermuda Blasters
31st Jan - Match 6 - 7:10 PM - Kalahari Knights vs Alpine Aces


Who will lift the trophy?🏆🎊

Teams and Owners
Kalahari Knights- @DesiGamers_ , @KaashPlays 
Peak Panthers- @pahadigamer_official, @S8ULSID 
Nexterra Nawabs- @Sooneeta , @ritikjain360 
Solara Sultans- @NonstopGaming_, @Munnabhaigaming 
Alpine Aces- @Badge99ff , @PNROSE 
Bermuda Blasters- @AssassinsARMY @Kullubaazi 

#FreeFireMAX #BooyahPremierLeague #Booyah

snippet.title: VaZra Ft. Vyoma - Sakchhau Ra? | Prod. Anup Kunwar | Official Music Video
snippet.description:

A dedication to every heart that chooses honesty over fear, and quietly asks the one it loves:
“can you hold my hand and stay, even when everything falls apart?”
——“Sakchhau Ra!?”

Rabb maan liya tujhko 
Jagg maan liya tujhko 
Tu he hai dunia meri 
Sabb maan liya tujhko,,

Maanga  jo paaya vahi  ,,

Dekh tere dil may 
Dil may dil may 
Dil may dil may yaara  toh nhi
Mai khogea khogea khogea khogea yaara hu kahi ,,

Bachkay ray bachkay deewane,,
Tu naino kay khel na jaane ,,


Tu meri jaan hai yaara ,,
Tu he hai jaan say pyara ,,
Sunali ve Sunlai ve dildara
Dhadkan banke rehna yaara ,,
Apna mujhey kehna yaara ,
Sunali ve Sunlai ve dildara ,

Tujhey yaar kahay
Jisay pyaar kahay 
Humey toh hogea hai vahi , 

Dekh tere dil may 
Dil may dil may 
Dil may dil may yaara  toh nhi
Mai khogea khogea ,,
khogea khogea khogea yaara hu kahi ,,

snippet.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 5 Hunters REVIVAL
snippet.description:
You voted for it. Time to take on 5 hunters. The hunters are back and better than ever. Will we AT LAST move on to 6 hunters?

Follow my socials:
➽ Twitter - @dream
➽ Instagram - @dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @dream

BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames 
George: @GeorgeNotFound 
Sapnap: @Sapnap 
Antfrost: @Antfrost 
awesamdude: @awesamdude 

Seed: 935327412
Version: 1.21.11

We decided to call this series Minecraft Manhunt. This video is a different rendition of it, where there is FIVE hunters. The 6th rendition of the 5 hunters series, the revival...

This is a new Minecraft but, 1.21.11 challenge that we have decided to try. I try to beat the game, while my friends George and Sapnap and BadBoyHalo and Antfrost  and Awesamdude try to prevent me from doing it. It's a race, and it's super intense and we had a lot of laughs. I love doing these challenges.

(Most) Music is from: @dreamproductionsXD 

#MinecraftManhunt

ru.title: Майнкрафт Спидраннер VS 5 Охотников ВОЗРОЖДЕНИЕ
ru.description:
Вы проголосовали за это. Время сразиться с 5 охотниками. Охотники вернулись, и они лучше, чем когда-либо. Сможем ли мы НАКОНЕЦ-ТО перейти к 6 охотникам?

Подпишитесь на мои соцсети:
➽ Твиттер - @Dream
➽ Инстаграм - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Снэпчат - @Dream

БэдБойХэйло:    @thesaintsofgames
Джордж:     @GeorgeNotFound
Сапнап:     @Sapnap
Энтфрост:  @Antfrost
Awesamdude: @Awesamdude

Сид: 935327412
Версия: 1.21.11

Мы решили назвать эту рубрику Майнкрафт Мэнхант. Это видео - другое исполнение этой рубрики, где охотников ПЯТЕРО. 6-е исполнение серии 5 охотников, ее возрождение...

Это новый Майнкрафт но, 1.21.11 челлендж, который мы решили попробовать. Я пытаюсь пройти игру, пока мои друзья Джордж, и Сапнап, и БэдБойХэйло, и Энтфрост, и Awesamdude пытаются меня остановить. Это гонка, и это супер напряженно, и мы много смеялись. Я люблю устраивать эти челленджи.

(Почти вся) Музыка из: ​⁠  @DreamproductionsXD

#MinecraftManhunt

sv.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 5 Jägare REVIVAL
sv.description:
Ni röstade på det. Dags att ta mig an 5 jägare. Jägarna är tillbaka och bättre än någonsin. Kommer vi ÄNTLIGEN ta oss till 6 jägare?

Följ mina sociala medier:
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dream

BadBoyHalo:    @thesaintsofgames
George:     @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap:     @Sapnap
Antfrost:  @Antfrost
Awesamdude: @Awesamdude

Seed: 935327412
Version: 1.21.11

Vi bestämde oss för att kalla den här serien Minecraft Manhunt. Den här videon är en annan version av 5 jägare serien, återupplivandet…

Det här är en ny Minecraft men, 1.21.11 utmaning som be har bestämt oss at pröva. Jag klarar spelet medan mina vänner George, Sapnap, Badboyhalo, Antfrost och Awesamdude försöker stimma mig från att göra det. Det är ett lopp, och det är super intensivt, och vi hade många skratt. Jag älskar att göra de här utmaningarna.

(Mest) Music är från: ​⁠  @DreamproductionsXD

#MinecraftManhunt

Tohle je nová “Minecraft, ale…” challenge v 1.21.11, kterou jsme se rozhodli vyzkoušet. Snažím se vyhrát, zatímco se mi to moji kamarádi George a Sapnap a BadBoyHalo a Antfrost a Awesamdude snaží překazit. Je to super intenzivní závod, během kterého jsme se hodně nasmáli. Zbožňuju tyto výzvy.

我们决定把这个系列命名为“我的世界猎人游戏”。本期视频是该系列的全新演绎，即5猎人模式。这是5猎人系列的第6次演绎，也是复赛……
这是我们决定尝试的全新Minecraft1.21.11挑战。我必须尝试通关游戏，而我的朋友George、Sapnap、BadBoyHalo、Antfrost和Awesamdude则会全力阻止我。这是一场竞速，场面超级紧张刺激，我们玩得非常开心。我真的很喜欢做这类挑战。

uk.title: Майнкрафт Спідранер проти 5 Мисливців ВІДРОДЖЕННЯ

Ми вирішили назвати ці серії Майнкрафт Менхантом. Це відео це інша інтерпретація, де є П'ЯТЬ мисливці. Це 6 версія серії з 5 мисливцями, відродження...

Це новий Майнкрафт, але 1.21.10 виклик що ми вирішили спробувати. Я намагаюсь пройти гру, поки мої друзі Джордж і Сепнеп і БедБойХало і Антфрост і Авсемдуд намагаються не дати мені цього зробити. Це перегони і вони дуже інтенсивні і ми мали над чим посміятись. Люблю займатись цими викликами.

ta.title: மைன்கிராஃப்ட் ஸ்பீட்ரன்னர் vs 5 ஹண்டர்ஸ் மறுமலர்ச்சி
ta.description:
நீங்க அதுக்கு வாக்களிச்சுட்டீங்க. 5 வேட்டைக்காரர்களை எதிர்கொள்ள வேண்டிய நேரம் இது. வேட்டைக்காரர்கள் திரும்பி வந்துட்டாங்க, எப்பவும் இல்லாத அளவுக்கு நல்லா இருக்காங்க. கடைசியிலயாவது 6 வேட்டைக்காரர்களை நோக்கி போவோமா?

Follow my socials:
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dream

BadBoyHalo:    @thesaintsofgames
George:     @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap:     @Sapnap
Antfrost:  @Antfrost
Awesamdude: @Awesamdude

Seed: 935327412
Version: 1.21.11

இந்தத் தொடரை Minecraft Manhunt என்று அழைக்க முடிவு செய்தோம். இந்த வீடியோ அதன் வித்தியாசமான பதிப்பு, இதில் ஐந்து வேட்டைக்காரர்கள் உள்ளனர். 5 வேட்டைக்காரர்கள் தொடரின் 6வது பதிப்பு, மறுமலர்ச்சி...

இது ஒரு புதிய Minecraft ஆனால், 1.21.11 சவாலை நாங்கள் முயற்சிக்க முடிவு செய்துள்ளோம். நான் விளையாட்டை வெல்ல முயற்சிக்கிறேன், அதே நேரத்தில் என் நண்பர்கள் ஜார்ஜ் மற்றும் சப்னாப் மற்றும் BadBoyHalo மற்றும் Antfrost ஆகியோர் அதைச் செய்வதைத் தடுக்க முயற்சிக்கிறார்கள். இது ஒரு பந்தயம், இது மிகவும் தீவிரமானது, எங்களுக்கு நிறைய சிரிப்புகள் இருந்தன. இந்த சவால்களைச் செய்வதை நான் விரும்புகிறேன்.

(Most) Music is from: ​⁠  @DreamproductionsXD

#MinecraftManhunt

हमने इसे “Minecraft Manhunt” सीरीज़ कहने का तय किया था। यह वीडियो इसका एक अलग संस्करण है, जहाँ 5 हंटर्स हैं। 5 हंटर्स सीरीज़ का छठा संस्करण...

यह एक नया Minecraft 'But' है और 1.21.11 की चुनौती है, जिसे हमने आज़माने का फ़ैसला किया था। मैं गेम को पूरा करने की कोशिश करता हूँ, जबकि मेरे दोस्त George और Sapnap और BadBoyHalo और Antfrost और Awesamdude मुझे रोकने की कोशिश करते हैं। यह एक बहुत ही तीव्र रेस है, जिसमें हमें बहुत मज़ा आया था। मुझे ऐसे चैलेंज करना बहुत पसंद है।

(ज़्यादातर) म्यूज़िक यहाँ से है:
@DreamproductionsXD

#MinecraftManhunt

bn.title: মাইনক্রাফ্ট স্পীড রানার ও ৫ হান্টারের পুনরলড়াই
bn.description:
তোমরা এর জন্য ভোট করেছো। সময় এসেছে ৫ হান্টারের বিরুদ্ধে লড়াই । হান্টাররা ফেরত এসেছে এবং আগের চেয়ে শক্তিশালী হয়ে । আমরা কি সর্বশেষে ৬ হান্টারের দিকে এগোবো?

আবার সোশ্যাল ফলো করো:
➽ টুইটার - @Dream
➽ ইনস্টাগ্রাম - @Dreamwastaken
➽ স্ন্যাপচ্যাট - @Dream

ব্যাডবয়হেলো:    @thesaintsofgames
জর্জ:     @GeorgeNotFound
স্যাপন্যাপ:     @Sapnap
অ্যান্টফ্রস্ট:  @Antfrost
অসোমডুড: @Awesamdude

সিড: 935327412
ভার্শন: ১.২১.১১

আমরা এ সিরিজকে মাইনক্রাফ্ট ম্যানহান্ট বলার সিদ্ধান্ত নিয়েছি। এই ভিডিও তারই পুনর চেষ্টা, যেখানে ৫ জন হান্টার আছে। ৫ হান্টারের ষষ্ঠ খেলা পুনরলড়াই...

এটা মাইনক্রাফট কিন্তু, ১.২১.১১ এর একটি চ্যালেঞ্জ যা আমরা করার সিদ্ধান্ত নিয়েছি । আমি গেমটি হারানোর চেষ্টা করব। যখন আমার বন্ধু জর্জ, স্যাপন্যাপ, ব্যাডবইহেলো এবং অ্যানফ্রস্ট আমাকে থামানোর চেষ্টা করবে। এটা একটা প্রতিযোগিতা এবং ‌ এটা অত্যন্ত তুখোর আর আমরা এটা করে অনেক মজা পেয়েছিলাম । আমি এরকম চ্যালেঞ্জ করতে পছন্দ করি।

Version: 1.21.11

ఈ సిరీస్‌కి మేము Minecraft Manhunt అని పేరు పెట్టాలని నిర్ణయించుకున్నాము. ఈ వీడియో దాని యొక్క భిన్నమైన వెర్షన్, ఇక్కడ ఐదుగురు వేటగాళ్ళు ఉన్నారు. 5 వేటగాళ్ళు సిరీస్ యొక్క 6వ వెర్షన్, పునరుద్ధరణ...

ఇది కొత్త Minecraft కానీ, 1.21.11 సవాలును మేము ప్రయత్నించాలని నిర్ణయించుకున్నాము. నేను ఆటను ఓడించడానికి ప్రయత్నిస్తాను, అయితే నా స్నేహితులు జార్జ్ మరియు సప్నాప్ మరియు బాడ్‌బాయ్‌హాలో మరియు ఆంట్‌ఫ్రాస్ట్ నన్ను దీన్ని చేయకుండా నిరోధించడానికి ప్రయత్నిస్తారు. ఇది ఒక రేసు, మరియు ఇది చాలా తీవ్రమైనది మరియు మేము చాలా నవ్వుకున్నాము. నాకు ఈ సవాళ్లను చేయడం చాలా ఇష్టం.

After intense battles, clutch plays, and shifting leaderboards, teams are stepping in with momentum, pressure, and everything to prove.

snippet.title: Live Dohori Nepali | "चिन्तै नगर "Chintai Nagara - Shiva Hamal & Sita Shrestha
snippet.description:
Presenting the authentic Nepali Live Dohori song "Chintai Nagara" By Shiva Hamal & Sita Shrestha, brought to you by Music Nepal.

This folk melody reflects the culture, tradition, and heartfelt emotions of Nepali villages. A perfect combination of soulful lyrics, traditional instruments, and rhythmic beats. Enjoy the real taste of Nepali folk, Dohori, and regional music heritage.
Celebrate the spirit of Nepal through Music Nepal’s timeless Lok Geet collection.

लाईभ दोहोरी नेपाली लोकसंगीतका सबैभन्दा जीवन्त र अन्तरक्रियात्मक स्वरूपहरूमध्ये एक हो, जसलाई वास्तविक समयमा प्रस्तुत गरिन्छ र दर्शकहरूले पनि प्रायः सहभागिता जनाउँछन्। यो केवल संगीत प्रस्तुति मात्र होइन—यो सांस्कृतिक संवाद हो, जसले बुद्धि, ताल, र कथावाचनलाई मिसाउँछ।

🎬Video Link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=S5bcoAGOj78

the end of the world

I Explored the Minecraft Farlands

Unstable SMP:
➜  @FlameFragsMC 
➜  ⁨@Spokeishere 
➜  @ParrotX2 
➜  ⁨@wemmbumc 

minor spoilers below

music from:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9UKPs9ZisfhMJdalnETLRg (tons of the music I use is by AZALI so check him out!) 
https://www.youtube.com/@andreaszoeller (all of the minecraft theme remixes!)

This is a Minecraft video recorded in the Unstable Universe / Unstable SMP that is staged for story-telling purposes; any more staged videos I upload will have a disclaimer in the description saying that they are also staged. Also, a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. 

music also from: official minecraft soundtrack, official elder scrolls soundtracks, official enderal soundtrack, epidemic sound (https://www.epidemicsound.com), storyblocks (https://www.storyblocks.com), artlist (https://artlist.io), soundstripe (https://www.soundstripe.com), fesliyan studios (https://www.fesliyanstudios.com/royalty-free-music), and envato (https://elements.envato.com/)

snippet.title: Bipul Chettri - Lopchu ko Orali (Official Visualiser)
snippet.description:
Lopchu, a small village in the Darjeeling hills, apart from its famous tea gardens is familiar to us as a spot to stop and relax for a bit while we journey on to various other places and journeys in life. So, even if it is for this brief moment, we give pause amongst mist, slow mornings, deep green slopes, and that calm, slightly melancholic beauty you only get in such mountain places. It carries a sense of stillness and depth, like something that doesn’t rush to explain itself. It belongs to memory.

Now streaming on all platforms.

MUSIC
Bipul Chettri - Vocals, Electric Guitar, Acoustic Guitar, Backing Vocals
Rahul Rai - Bass
Shantanu Sudarshan - Drums, Percussions
Prince Nepali - Sarangi, Tungna, Madal
Anindo Bose - Organ
Blue Notes School of Music Ensemble - Backing Vocals

Recorded by Jonty Indra, Anindo Bose & Binaya Man Amatya
Mixed & Mastered by Binaya Man Amatya

Lyrics, Composition & Arrangement - Bipul Chettri
Producer - Bipul Chettri
Executive Producer - Sonam Tashi

A Video by Gundruk

Shot by Pemba Tshering Tamang & Akash Pradhan

In Appearance
Sujit Subba, Palzer Lama, Passang Lamu Sherpa, Pratibha Subba, Aryan Rai, Jorden Sherpa, Nehal Pradhan

Drone video by Abhishek Painkra (abi_isiwaqt)
Trip managed by Trail Begins

We would like to extend our very special thanks to:
The Mukhian Homestay, Lopchu, Anmol Mukhia, Aaku Pema Dukpa & the amazing people of Lopchu.

All Rights Reserved by Bipul Chettri. 2026.

snippet.description:

Lyrics:

[Verse 1]
A club isn't the best place to find a lover
So the bar is where I go (Mm)
Me and my friends at the table doin' shots
Drinkin' fast and then we talk slow (Mm)
And you come over and start up a conversation with just me
And trust me, I'll give it a chance now (Mm)
Take my hand, stop, put Van the Man on the jukebox
And then we start to dance, and now I'm singin' like

[Pre-Chorus]
Girl, you know I want your love
Your love was handmade for somebody like me
Well, come on now, follow my lead
I may be crazy, don't mind me
Say, "Boy, let's not talk too much"
Grab on my waist and put that body on me
Well, come on now, follow my lead
Come, come on now, follow my lead, mm

[Chorus]
I'm in love with the shape of you
We push and pull like a magnet do
Although my heart is fallin' too
I'm in love with your body
And last night, you were in my room
And now my bed sheets smell like you
Every day, discoverin' somethin' brand new
Well, I'm in love with your body

[Post-Chorus]
Oh, I, oh, I, oh, I, oh, I
Well, I'm in love with your body
Oh, I, oh, I, oh, I, oh, I
Well, I'm in love with your body
Oh, I, oh, I, oh, I, oh, I
Well, I'm in love with your body
Every day, discoverin' somethin' brand new
I'm in love with the shape of you

[Verse 2]
One week in, we let the story begin
We're goin' out on our first date (Mm)
You and me are thrifty, so go all-you-can-eat
Fill up your bag and I fill up a plate (Mm)
We talk for hours and hours about the sweet and the sour
And how your family is doin' okay (Mm)
And leave and get in a taxi, and kiss in the back seat
Tell the driver make the radio play and I'm singin' like

[Pre-Chorus]
Girl, you know I want your love
Your love was handmade for somebody like me
Well, come on now, follow my lead
I may be crazy, don't mind me
Say, "Boy, let's not talk too much"
Grab on my waist and put that body on me
Well, come on now, follow my lead
Come, come on now, follow my lead, mm

[Chorus]

We push and pull like a magnet do
Although my heart is fallin' too
I'm in love with your body
And last night, you were in my room
And now my bed sheets smell like you
Every day, discoverin' somethin' brand new
Well, I'm in love with your body

[Post-Chorus]
Oh, I, oh, I, oh, I, oh, I
Well, I'm in love with your body
Oh, I, oh, I, oh, I, oh, I
Well, I'm in love with your body
Oh, I, oh, I, oh, I, oh, I
Well, I'm in love with your body
Every day, discoverin' somethin' brand new
I'm in love with the shape of you

[Bridge]
Come on, be my baby, come on
Come on, be my baby, come on
Come on, be my baby, come on
Come on, be my baby, come on
Come on, be my baby, come on
Come on, be my baby, come on
Come on, be my baby, come on

And now my bed sheets smell like you

Well, I'm in love with your body

[Outro]

[Couplet 1]
Une boîte de nuit, c'est pas le meilleur endroit pour trouver l'amour.

Alors je vais au bar (Mm).

Avec mes potes, on enchaîne les shots.

On boit vite et on discute tranquillement (Mm).

Et tu viens me parler.

Crois-moi, je te donne une chance. (Mm)

Prends ma main, on s'arrête, on met Van Morrison au juke-box.

Et on se met à danser, et là je chante comme ça :

Allez, viens, suis-moi

Songtext:

[Strophe 1]
Ein Club ist nicht der beste Ort, um jemanden kennenzulernen.
Deshalb gehe ich lieber an die Bar (Mm).
Ich und meine Freunde sitzen am Tisch und trinken Shots.
Wir trinken schnell und unterhalten uns dann langsam (Mm).
Und dann kommst du rüber und fängst ein Gespräch mit mir an.
Und glaub mir, ich gebe dir jetzt eine Chance (Mm).
Nimm meine Hand, bleib stehen, leg Van The Man auf.
Und dann fangen wir an zu tanzen, und jetzt singe ich so:

[Pre-Chorus]
Mädchen, du weißt, ich will deine Liebe.
Deine Liebe ist wie für jemanden wie mich gemacht.
Na los, folge mir! Ich führe dich
Ich bin vielleicht verrückt, nimm es mir nicht übel
Sag: "Junge, lass uns nicht so viel reden"
Fass mich an der Taille und drück deinen Körper an mich
Na komm schon, folge mir
Komm, komm schon, folge mir, mm

[Refrain]
Ich bin verliebt in deine Figur
Wir ziehen uns an wie Magneten
Obwohl mein Herz auch fällt
Ich bin verliebt in deinen Körper

Und jetzt riechen meine Laken nach dir

Starring Cezal Gautam

Lights: Baba dai and team

Assistant DOP: Ashish (Aurora Productions)
Directed, shot and edited by storenutter

Venue partner: The Bar Room, Thamel

snippet.title: Lord Huron - The Night We Met (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
⏬ Download / Stream: 
http://smarturl.it/iLHStrangeTrails

⚡️ Lord Huron:
https://www.instagram.com/lordhuron
https://www.facebook.com/lordhuron
https://x.com/lordhuron

⚡️ Creative Chaos:
https://soundcloud.com/creativchaos
https://open.spotify.com/user/creativchaos
https://www.tiktok.com/@creative.chaos_
https://www.facebook.com/creatvchaos
https://x.com/crevtivechaos
https://www.instagram.com/creativ.chaos

Lyrics:

[Intro]
(Ooh, ooh, ooh)
(Ooh, ooh, ooh)
(Ooh, ooh, ooh)
(Ooh, ooh, ooh)

[Verse 1]
I am not the only traveler
Who has not repaid his debt
I've been searching for a trail to follow again
Take me back to the night we met
And then I can tell myself
What the hell I'm supposed to do
And then I can tell myself
Not to ride along with you

[Chorus]
I had all and then most of you
Some and now none of you
Take me back to the night we met
I don't know what I'm supposed to do
Haunted by the ghost of you
Oh, take me back to the night we met

[Verse 2]
When the night was full of terrors
And your eyes were filled with tears
When you had not touched me yet
Oh, take me back to the night we met

[Chorus]
I had all and then most of you
Some and now none of you
Take me back to the night we met
I don't know what I'm supposed to do
Haunted by the ghost of you
Take me back to the night we met

🚫 If you want to use this music in your video you will need permission from the artist or label.

snippet.title: Ed Sheeran - Shape Of You (Lyrics) (432Hz)
snippet.description:
Ed Sheeran - Shape Of You
Ed Sheeran - Shape Of You (Lyrics) (432Hz)

📲 Stream/Download "Shape Of You" by Ed Sheeran:
🎵 Follow the official 432Hz Music playlist on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/0SXvWzEwThu9BsCqXcdDkP

---

❗ Important ❗

📌 432Hz is the scale that unites the body and consciousness with nature.

Reasons why you should listen to all your music in 432Hz:

- Leads to meditative state of body and mind
- Natural musical pitch of the universe
- More harmonic and pleasant sound
- Easier on the ears (less hearing damage)
- Works at stimulating the chakras
- Releases emotional blockages
- Expands consciousness
- Influences spiritual development of the listener

---

Lyrics for Shape Of You - Ed Sheeran:

[Verse 1]
A club isn't the best place to find a lover
So the bar is where I go (Mm)
Me and my friends at the table doin' shots
Drinkin' fast and then we talk slow (Mm)
And you come over and start up a conversation with just me
And trust me, I'll give it a chance now (Mm)
Take my hand, stop, put Van the Man on the jukebox
And then we start to dance, and now I'm singin' like

[Pre-Chorus]
Girl, you know I want your love
Your love was handmade for somebody like me
Well, come on now, follow my lead
I may be crazy, don't mind me
Say, "Boy, let's not talk too much"
Grab on my waist and put that body on me
Well, come on now, follow my lead
Come, come on now, follow my lead, mm

[Chorus]
I'm in love with the shape of you
We push and pull like a magnet do
Although my heart is fallin' too
I'm in love with your body
And last night, you were in my room
And now my bed sheets smell like you
Every day, discoverin' somethin' brand new
Well, I'm in love with your body

[Post-Chorus]
Oh, I, oh, I, oh, I, oh, I
Well, I'm in love with your body
Oh, I, oh, I, oh, I, oh, I
Well, I'm in love with your body
Oh, I, oh, I, oh, I, oh, I
Well, I'm in love with your body
Every day, discoverin' somethin' brand new
I'm in love with the shape of you

[Verse 2]
One week in, we let the story begin
We're goin' out on our first date (Mm)
You and me are thrifty, so go all-you-can-eat
Fill up your bag and I fill up a plate (Mm)
We talk for hours and hours about the sweet and the sour
And how your family is doin' okay (Mm)
And leave and get in a taxi, and kiss in the back seat
Tell the driver make the radio play and I'm singin' like

snippet.title: तुम्हारी नज़रों में हमने देखा | Kal Ki Awaz | Asha Bhosle | Kumar Sanu Songs | Pratibha Sinha
snippet.description:
🎶 Dive into the enchanting world of 90s romance with Asha Bhosle and Kumar Sanu's timeless melody, "Tumhari Nazron Mein Humne Dekha" from the movie Kal Ki Awaz. Relive the golden era of Bollywood music with this heart-touching song that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. Let the soulful voices of Asha Bhosle and Kumar Sanu transport you to a realm of pure emotion. 



Credits :

Song: Tumhari Nazron Mein Humne Dekha
Album: Kal Ki Awaz
Artist: Asha Bhosle | Kumar Sanu
Music Director: Nadeem-Shravan
Lyricist: Sameer 


If this song touched your heart, don't forget to like, share, and comment with your favorite 90s romantic song! Subscribe for more timeless melodies and classic Bollywood gems. Let the magic of music live on…

snippet.title: New Nepali Bhajan || Murali Tiriri | मुरली तिरीरी || Suraj Bhandari, Hiralal Kandel | Pabitra & Kosh
snippet.description:
Suraj Bhandari Presents

Murali Tiriri | मुरली तिरिरि || New Nepali Bhajan 2026 | 2082

An uplifting devotional bhajan celebrating the divine flute (Murali) of Lord Krishna, inspiring devotion, peace, and spiritual connection.

Experience the soulful voice of Suraj Bhandari as he brings the timeless devotion and melody of Murali Tiriri to life, accompanied by vibrant music and artistic choreography.

🎼 Bhajan Credits (Audio)

🎶 Lyrics Title: Murali Tiriri (मुरली तिरिरि)
🎤 Vocal: Suraj Bhandari
🎶 Lyrics / Melody: Hiralal Kadel
🎶 Music Arrangement: Madhav Bhandari
🎤 Mixing / Mastering: Keshab Chhinal
🎶 Recording Studio: Dynamic Digital Recording Studio

🎬 Video Credits

🎶 Artists: Pabitra Acharya, Kosh Khadka
🎤 Director / Choreographer: Pabitra Acharya
🎶 Makeup Artist: Subash Timalsina
🎶 Art Director: Jata Shankar Gosai
🎤 Camera: Bikash Ghimire & Team
🎶 Jewelry Partner: The Krishmaz Collections
🎶 Dance Team: Udharan Manch Dance Training Center

🎶 Special Thanks:
🎶 Uttam Adhikari

🎶 Kusum Sitaula

Song: Namo Namo
Movie: Kedarnath
Singer: Amit Trivedi
Lyricist: Amitabh Bhattacharya

Crew:
Composed & Produced by Amit Trivedi
Recording Engineers A T Studios, Mumbai - Abhishek Sortey & Urmila Sutar  
Assisted by  Firoz Shaikh
Mixed & Mastered by Shadab Rayeen,  A T Studios & New Edge - Mumbai 
Assisted by Abhishek Sortey & Dhananjay Khapekar
Executive Producer A T Studios - Krutee Trivedi
Head Of Production A T Studios - Aashish Narula

Musician Names:
Programmed -  Amit Trivedi, Raja Rasaily & Krishna Kishor
Percussions - Krishna Kishor
Flute - Vishnu Vijay
Sitar - Kishor 
Mandolin & Strings - Seenu 
Backing Vocals - Rajiv Sundaresan & Suhas Sawant

RSVP & Guy In The Sky Pictures present #Kedarnath 
Starring: Sushant Singh Rajput, Sara Ali Khan, Nitish Bharadwaj, Alka Amin, Sonali Sachdev, Pooja Gor, Nishant Dahiya

Directed by: Abhishek Kapoor 
Produced by: Ronnie Screwvala & Pragya Kapoor 
Co-Produced by: Abhishek Kapoor & Abhishek Nayyar 
Story: Abhishek Kapoor & Kanika Dhillon 
Screenplay & Dialogue: Kanika Dhillon 
Music: Amit Trivedi 
DOP: Tushar Kanti Ray 
Action Director: Dave Judge & Sunil Rodrigues 
Editor: Chandan Arora 
Background Score: Hitesh Sonik 
Sound Designer: Allwin Rego & Sanjay Maurya.

Lyrics:
Jai Ho Jai Ho Shankara
(Bholenath Shankara)
Aadi Dev Shankara
(Hey Shivay Shankara)
Tere Jaap Ke Bina
(Bholenath Shankara)
Chale Ye Saans Kis Tarah
(Hey Shivay Shankara)

Mera Karm Tu Hi Jaane
Kya Bura Hai Kya Bhalaa…
Tere Raaste Pe Main Toh
Aankh Moond Ke Chalaa…

Tere Naam Ki Jot Ne
Saara Har Liya Tamas Mera

Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Hey Triloknath Shambhu
Hey Shivay Shankara

Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Rudradev Hey Maheshvarah

Srishti Ke Janam Se Bhi
(O O…)
Pehle Tera Vaas Tha
(O O…)
Ye Jag Rahe Ya Naa Rahe
(O O…)
Rahegi Teri Aastha
(O O…)

Kya Samay… Kya Pralay
Dono Mein Teri Mahaanta
Mahaanta… Mahaanta…

Seepiyon Ki Ontt Main
(Bholenath Shankara)
Motiyaan Ho Jis Tarah
(Hey Shivay Shankara)
Mere Mann Mein Shankara
(Bholenath Shankara)
Tu Basa Hai Uss Tarah
(Hey Shivay Shankara)

Mujhe Bharam Tha Jo Hai Mera
Tha Nahin Kabhi Mera…

Arth Kya Nirarth Kya
Jo Bhi Hai Sabhi Tera…
Tere Saamne Hai Jhuka
Mere Sar Pe Haath Rakh Tera
Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Hey Triloknath Shambhu
Hey Shivay Shankara

Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Rudradev Hey Maheshvara

Chandrama Lalaat Pe (O O…)
Bhasm Hai Bhujaaon Mein (O O…)
Vastra Baagh Chhaal Ka (O O…)
Hai Khadau Paanv Mein (O O…)

Pyaas Kya Ho Tujhe
Ganga Hai Teri Jataaon Mein
Jataaon Mein… Jataaon Mein…

Doosron Ke Waaste
(Bholenath Shankara)
Tu Sadaiv Hai Jiya
(Hey Shivay Shankara)
Maanga Kuch Kabhi Nahi
(Bholenath Shankara)
Tune Sirf Hai Diya
(Hey Shivay Shankara)

Samudra Manthan Ka Tha Samay Jo Aa Pada
Dwand Dono Lok Me Vish-Amrit Pe Tha Chhida
Amrit Sabhi Main Baant Ke
Pyala Vish Ka Tune Khud Piya

Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Hey Triloknath Shambhu
Hey Shivay Shankara

Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Rudradev Hey Maheshvara
Rudradev Hey Maheshvara
Rudradev Hey Maheshvara

#NamoNamo #lordshiva #kedarnath

snippet.description:
Mind Relaxing - Shri Krishna Govind Hare Murari | Krishan Bhajan 2026 श्री कृष्ण गोविंद हरे मुरारी

🙏 जो भी श्रद्धा और विश्वास के साथ इस मंत्र को सुनता है—
उसके जीवन में शांति, सुख, भक्ति और सकारात्मक ऊर्जा आती है।

🪔 कहा जाता है कि यह मंत्र सुनने से:
✔️ मन शांत होता है
✔️ नकारात्मक ऊर्जा दूर होती है
✔️ घर में सकारात्मकता बढ़ती है
✔️ मन में भक्ति और प्रेम जागता है
✔️ तनाव, डर और चिंता समाप्त होती है

💖 Mantra Lyrics:

Shri Krishna Govind Hare Murare
Hey Nath Narayan Vasudeva

🌿 Headphones लगाकर 108 बार इस मंत्र को सुनें और अनुभव करें:

✨ शांति
✨ भक्ति
✨ प्रेम
✨ दिव्य ऊर्जा

अगर यह मंत्र आपके दिल को शांति दे —
तो Like ❤️, Share 🔁 और Comment में “जय श्री कृष्णा 🙏” अवश्य लिखें।

🔥 Tags (Ignore):

snippet.title: ROAD TO 126 OVR Begins!
snippet.description:
The road to 126 OVR continues! Today, I finally assemble the dream trio: 117 Lionel Messi, 117 Cristiano Ronaldo, and 117 Ruud Gullit.

In this video, I go all-in on the TOTY Draft Packs to hunt down the best attackers in the game. My pack luck was absolutely insane. I packed 117 Cristiano Ronaldo and 117 Lionel Messi in the same recording session!

After securing the attack, I moved to the Defenders pack to find Ruud Gullit. It was a struggle (so many Van Dijk duplicates!), but we finally completed the squad.

🔥 PACK OPENING HIGHLIGHTS:

PACKED 117 CRISTIANO RONALDO (The Suii!) 🇵🇹

PACKED 117 LIONEL MESSI (The Goat!) 🇦🇷

PACKED 117 VIRGIL VAN DIJK (Multiple times!) 🇳🇱

Completing the Ruud Gullit Exchange ✅

Reaching 125 OVR & Gameplay 🎮

📩 Business Inquiries → *rkreddy@digitalsportsmgmt.com*
